title: Trump extends ceasefire to give Iran more time to negotiate
summary_full: The US president cast the breakdown in more talks as resulting from Iranian infighting, adding that Pakistan's leaders had asked him to extend the truce
summary_public: The US president cast the breakdown in more talks as resulting from Iranian infighting, adding that Pakistan's leaders had asked him to extend the truce

IR.label: neutral
